text: I find myself surrounded by the marks of a creative, intellectual environment. The glass walls and technology hint at collaboration and innovation; they invite curiosity but also put me on display, stirring a sense of vulnerability. Observing the R+D display, I feel the optimism of possibility, mirrored by the quote about designing amidst uncertainty. There is ambiguity here, yet also a calm readiness—an awareness that this space thrives on unfinished thoughts and the drive to make them real. I am both exposed and inspired, half-rooted in the safety of structure, half-drifting in the potential of what could be.
